Products/Promotions & Campaigns
Promotions & Campaigns

Promotions that predict, personalize , and convert.

Rule-based promotions for the marketer. ML-driven personalization for the data team. One engine, all your channels — without a six-month Talon.One implementation.

Campaign Simulator

See your campaign's lift before you launch it.

Build the rule. Pick the segment. The simulator replays your last 30 days of orders and shows you exactly which customers would have triggered, how much you'd have discounted, and what GMV would have moved.

Campaign · Spring Refresh · Simulating against last 30 days
Simulating
Conditions (IF)
When ⠿⠿
customer.tier in ["gold", "platinum"]
And ⠿⠿
cart.subtotal >= $120
And ⠿⠿
cart.contains in ["spring-2026"]
+ Add condition
Reward (THEN)
Apply ⠿⠿
discount = 25% points_multiplier = 2x
Audience segments
Gold + Platinum × High-LTV × + Add segment
Schedule
starts = Apr 15, 9am ends = Apr 30, 11pm
Projected impact · 30-day replay
Based on 12,840 orders · Mar 1 – Mar 31, 2026

1,506

+$48,210
↑ 14.2% on segment

ML Personalization

Stop discounting customers who'd buy anyway.

The biggest waste in promotions: 25% off the customer who would have paid full price. Our ML engine scores every customer's discount sensitivity in real time, so your most loyal buyers see “early access” instead of “25% off” — and your wavering carts see exactly the nudge they need to convert.

  • ✓ Per-customer discount sensitivity score updated nightly from your full order history
  • ✓ Predicted incremental margin — see if a discount is paying for itself before you offer it
  • ✓ Auto-tune offer strength per segment, per customer, per cart context
  • ✓ Same engine that powers Talon.One Predict — without the six-month onboarding
Explore Predict →
A
Ada · cus_8KPq2x
12 orders · $2,840 LTV · Gold
Sure-thing
Discount sensitivity
Low (12%)
Recommended offer
Early access
No discount needed

Marcus · cus_3Lm9zR
3 orders · $410 LTV · Bronze
On the fence
Discount sensitivity
Medium (54%)
Recommended offer
15% off
+$28 expected lift
P
Priya · cus_7Yp4kQ
1 order · $89 LTV · New
Churn risk
Discount sensitivity
High (87%)
Recommended offer
25% + free ship
High retention payoff
Built-in A/B Testing

Test like Netflix, not like a Shopify app.

Every campaign is an A/B test by default. Pick a baseline. Pick a variant. Watch the engine auto-detect statistical significance, declare a winner, and roll out the winning variant to 100% of your audience — without a single ticket to your data team.

  • ✓ Auto-significance detection using sequential testing — no peeking penalty
  • ✓ Multi-arm bandit mode for faster convergence on winning offers
  • ✓ Holdout groups measured against revenue, AOV, and downstream LTV
  • ✓ Audit log of every test, every result — defensible decisions for your CFO
Learn about A/B testing →
Variant A
10% off all items
Visitors6,420
Orders412
AOV$148
6.42%
Conversion rate
✓ Winner
Variant B
Free shipping over $100
Visitors6,420
Orders471
AOV$162
7.34%
Conversion rate
✓
Variant B wins by +14.3% · 99% confidence · Auto-rolling out to 100%
Couponless Redemption

Stop leaking your margin to coupon sites.

Coupon codes get scraped, shared on Honey and RetailMeNot, and end up discounting customers who never qualified. Couponless redemption ties promotions directly to customer identity — so the right person gets the right discount, automatically, with nothing to leak.

  • ✓ Customer-bound promotions evaluate at cart time — no code, no leak
  • ✓ Hybrid mode for legacy use cases that still need codes (influencer drops, magazine ads)
  • ✓ Single-use unique codes generated at scale, tied to identity, expire on first use
See couponless flow →
1
Customer adds items to cart
Identity already known via session or login
12:04:11
2
99minds evaluates eligibility in 38ms
Cart context + customer profile + active rules
12:04:11
3
Best-fit promotion auto-applies
25% off + 2x points · "Spring Refresh" rule
12:04:12
4
No code shown · No code to leak
Honey extension finds nothing to scrape
12:04:12
For developers

Evaluate any cart in under 50ms.

A single endpoint takes a cart and a customer ID, returns every applicable promotion sorted by best-fit. Idempotent. Edge-deployed. Designed to live inside your checkout's hot path.

Edge-deployed evaluation

Multi-region edge nodes mean p50 of 38ms anywhere on Earth. Your checkout never blocks waiting on a promo decision.

Stackable & exclusive logic

Built-in stacking rules. Tier-protected exclusives. No more two coupons accidentally combining for free product.

Replay any decision

Every evaluation is logged with the full inputs. Reproduce a customer's exact discount calculation months later for audits or disputes.

// Evaluate every applicable promo for this cart const result = await client.promotions.evaluate({" customer: 'cus_8KPq2x', cart: { items: [ { sku: 'LIN-OS-M', price: 16500, qty: 1 }, { sku: 'WLT-28', price: 14500, qty: 1 }, { sku: 'CTOTE', price: 5800, qty: 1 } ], currency: 'usd' }, context: { channel: 'web', region: 'us-east' } });   // ✓ 38ms response { applied: [{ id: 'promo_spring_refresh', discount: 9200, // $92.00 points_bonus: 1000, reason: 'Gold tier + spring collection' }], eval_id: 'eval_38xK9q' // for replay/audit }
Why teams switch from Talon.One

The same depth. None of the implementation pain.

Talon.One is the gold standard for enterprise promotions — and we respect it. But for most mid-market and DTC brands, it's overpriced, overscoped, and over a year to deploy. We built the same engine you can ship in weeks.

Customer Story

How Verdant grew incremental margin 31%.

VERDANT

"We were quoted nine months for Talon.One. We launched on 99minds in three weeks. The ML personalization alone paid for the platform in the first quarter — we stopped throwing 25% at customers who would have bought at full price."

PP
Priya Patel
Director of Growth, Verdant
Results in first 6 months
+31%
Incremental margin on promoted orders
-42%
Discount cost per order via ML targeting
147
A/B tests run in 6 months — most by marketing alone
3 wks
From contract signed to first live campaign
Common questions

Things buyers usually ask.

Our model trains on your full order history (typically 12-24 months) and calculates a discount sensitivity score per customer per category. At cart-evaluation time, we combine that score with cart context (LTV, recency, basket composition, channel) to recommend the smallest discount that maximizes expected incremental margin. Customers who'd buy anyway see no discount; wavering customers see exactly the nudge they need.
Yes. Our migration team has a proven playbook for translating Talon.One campaigns and rules into 99minds configs. Most rule sets translate 1:1 because the underlying logic is similar. We typically complete a full migration in 4-6 weeks, including parallel-running both systems to validate identical outputs before cutover.
p50 of 38ms, p99 of 110ms, measured globally from edge nodes. We run multi-region active-active and our cart evaluation endpoint is colocated with the cart-state caches your checkout already uses. In practice, 99minds adds less to your checkout latency than your average product image lazy-load.
Talon.One enterprise contracts typically start in the low-six-figures annually with significant implementation services on top. 99minds enterprise pricing starts around $2,500/month for the promotions engine alone, scaling on monthly evaluation volume. For a brand doing $50M GMV with active personalization, our customers typically save 60-75% versus a comparable Talon.One contract.
Yes — and this is a key advantage of being on a unified platform. A customer can earn 2x loyalty points, redeem against a gift card balance, and apply a promo discount in the same checkout, with all stacking and exclusivity logic evaluated together. With Talon.One you would integrate three separate systems and maintain reconciliation logic yourself.

Ready to ship promotions that actually pay back?

Start with a sandbox key in 30 seconds. Run the simulator on your own data this afternoon.
